title: Coroutine
subtitle: Coroutine is an primitive for Io's lightweight cooperative C-stack based threads.

members.name: backTraceString
members.description: Returns a formatted callStack output along with exception info (if any). In case of CGI script, wraps output with <code> tag.

members.name: callStack
members.description: Returns a list of Call objects.

members.name: currentCoroutine
members.description: Returns currently running coroutine in Io state.

members.name: currentFrame
members.description:
Returns the current (topmost) EvalFrame of this coroutine,
    or nil if no frames are active. Only works for the currently
    executing coroutine.

members.name: debugWriteln
members.description: See <tt>Object debugWriteln</tt>.

members.name: exception
members.description: Returns the current exception or nil if there is none.

members.name: freeStack
members.description: Frees all the internal data from the receiver's stack. Returns self.

members.name: handlerStack
members.description: The list of resumable exception handler entries for this coroutine, or nil.

members.name: ignoredCoroutineMethodNames
members.description: List of methods to ignore when building a <tt>callStack</tt>.

members.name: implementation
members.description: Returns coroutine implementation type: "frame-based" (portable, no assembly)

members.name: inException
members.description: Set to true when processing an exception in the coroutine.

members.name: ioStack
members.description: Returns List of values on this coroutine's stack.

members.name: isCurrent
members.description: Returns true if the receiver is currently running coroutine.

members.name: isYielding
members.description: Returns true if the receiver is yielding (not paused or running).

members.name: label
members.description: A label slot useful for debugging purposes.

members.name: main
members.description: [Seems to be obsolete!] Executes runMessage, resumes parent coroutine.

members.name: parentCoroutine
members.description: Returns the parent coroutine this one was chained from or nil if it wasn't chained. When a Coroutine ends, it will attempt to resume its parent.

members.name: pause
members.description:
Removes current coroutine from the yieldingCoros queue and yields to another coro. System exit is executed if no coros left.
You can resume a coroutine using either resume or resumeLater message.

members.name: pauseCurrentAndResumeSelf
members.description: Pauses current coroutine and yields to a receiver.

members.name: raiseException
members.description: Sets exception in the receiver and signals the eval loop to unwind.

members.name: rawSignalException
members.description:
Bridges an Io-level exception to the eval loop by setting errorRaised.
    Called by raiseException when there is no parent coroutine to resume.
    The exception should already be set on this coroutine via setException.

members.name: recentInChain
members.description: Returns the coroutine in the coro chain which was most recently run, so you can pause and resume coroutine based constructs like try and actors.

members.name: result
members.description: The result set when the coroutine ends.

members.name: resume
members.description:
Yields to the receiver. Runs the receiver if it is not running yet.
    Returns self.

members.name: resumeLater
members.description:
Promotes receiver to the top of the yieldingCoros queue, but not yielding to it.
		When current coroutine yields, receiver will resume.

members.name: resumeParentCoroutine
members.description: Pauses current coroutine and resumes parent.

members.name: run
members.description: Runs receiver and returns self.

members.name: runLocals
members.description: The locals object in whose context the coroutine will send its run message.

members.name: runMessage
members.description: The message to send to the runTarget when the coroutine starts.

members.name: runTarget
members.description: The object which the coroutine will send a message to when it starts.

members.name: setInException
members.description: Set the inException status. Returns self.

members.name: setLabel
members.description: Sets the comment label for the Coro. Return self.

members.name: setMessageDebugging
members.description:
Turns on message level debugging for this coro. When on, this
    coro will send a vmWillSendMessage message to the Debugger object before
    each message send and pause itself. See the Debugger object documentation
    for more information.

members.name: setParentCoroutine
members.description: Sets the parent coroutine. Returns self.

members.name: setRecentInChain
members.description:
Sets the most recently run coroutine of the chain.
    Sets all the recentInChain in a direct path up to the top of the coro chain
    starting at this coro. Returns self.

members.name: setStackSize
members.description: Sets the stack size in bytes to allocate for new Coros. Returns self.

members.name: showStack
members.description: Writes backTraceString to STDOUT.

members.name: showYielding
members.description: Prints a list of yielding coroutines to STDOUT.

members.name: stackSize
members.description: Stack size allocated for each new coroutine. Coroutines will automatically chain themselves as need if more stack space is required.

members.name: typeId
members.description: Returns <type>_<uniqueHexId> string.

members.name: yield
members.description:
Yields to another coroutine in the yieldingCoros queue.
		Does nothing if yieldingCoros is empty.

members.name: yieldCurrentAndResumeSelf
members.description: Yields to a receiver.

members.name: yieldingCoros
members.description: Reference to Scheduler yieldingCoros.
